\tzpentry{ID5749}{Entangled Quantum State Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5749 introduces Entangled Quantum State Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} |\Psi\rangle_{entangled} = \frac{1}{\sqrt{2}}\left(|L,R\rangle + e^{i\phi_{helix}}|R,L\rangle\right) \end{equation}
